panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of this subsystem.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit over time, one of the most important plant-stress signals in the greenhouse.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, state AS "State" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows greenhouse equipment or controller state over time.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows light availability or daily light integral behavior.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current alerts relevant to this dashboard context.

panels.title: Equipment Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, fn_equipment_health()::text AS "Equipment Health"

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of this subsystem.

panels.title: VPD Stress Hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit over time, one of the most important plant-stress signals in the greenhouse.

panels.title: Cold Stress Hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows how many hours recent conditions spent below the crop-relevant cold-stress threshold.

panels.title: Reference DLI

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux * 0.0185 * 3600 / 1e6 AS "Reference DLI"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Tempest-derived DLI with polycarbonate correction

panels.title: GDD Today

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), MAX(gdd_cumulative) AS "GDD"
FROM v_gdd
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows growing degree days accumulated today, a useful proxy for crop development pace.

panels.title: Heat Stress Hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows how many hours recent conditions spent above the crop-relevant heat-stress threshold.

panels.title: Water Used

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), water_total_gal AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows water use or irrigation behavior over time.

panels.title: DIF

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), dif AS "DIF"
FROM v_dif
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
ORDER BY date

panels.description: Shows the day-minus-night temperature differential, which influences plant form and growth behavior.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux * 0.0185 * 3600 / 1e6 AS "Reference DLI"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  $__time(date::timestamptz),
  dli_final AS "DLI (mol/m²)"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND dli_final IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux * 0.0185 AS "Est. PPFD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS "Outdoor Lux"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM SUM(CASE WHEN state THEN next_ts - ts ELSE '0'::interval END)) / 3600.0, 2) AS "Grow Light Hours"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, state, LEAD(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY equipment ORDER BY ts) AS next_ts
  FROM equipment_state
  WHERE equipment IN ('grow_light_main','grow_light_grow') AND ts >= date_trunc('day', now())
) sub

SELECT $__time(ts), transmission_pct AS "Transmission %"
FROM v_light_transmission
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), MAX(gdd_cumulative) AS "GDD"
FROM v_gdd
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), dif AS "DIF"
FROM v_dif
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(ts), water_total_gal AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), gal_per_mol_dli AS "gal/mol" FROM v_water_efficiency WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) ORDER BY date

panels.title: Solar Altitude & DLI Accumulation

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS "Sun Altitude"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), dli_today AS "DLI Today"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dli_today IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows light availability or daily light integral behavior.

panels.title: Forecast Conditions (Next 48h)
panels.description: Outdoor temperature and humidity forecast — helps predict stress and disease windows

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_f AS "Forecast Temp (°F)"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE ts >= now() AND ts <= now() + interval '48 hours'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), rh_pct AS "Forecast RH (%)"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE ts >= now() AND ts <= now() + interval '48 hours'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), solar_w_m2 AS "Forecast Solar (W/m²)"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE ts >= now() AND ts <= now() + interval '48 hours'
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Hydro TDS & Water Temperature
panels.description: YINMIK water quality tester: Total Dissolved Solids (nutrient strength) and water temperature

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), hydro_tds_ppm AS "TDS (ppt)"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND hydro_tds_ppm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), hydro_water_temp_f AS "Water Temp (°F)"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND hydro_water_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: South 1 Moisture

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_moisture_south_1 AS "Moisture" FROM climate WHERE soil_moisture_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil moisture from the first south-zone probe.

panels.title: South 2 Moisture

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_moisture_south_2 AS "Moisture" FROM climate WHERE soil_moisture_south_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil moisture from the second south-zone probe.

panels.title: West Moisture

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_moisture_west AS "Moisture" FROM climate WHERE soil_moisture_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil moisture from the west-zone probe.

panels.title: South 1 EC

targets.rawSql: SELECT soil_ec_south_1 AS "EC" FROM climate WHERE soil_ec_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows soil electrical conductivity from the EC-capable first south-zone probe.

panels.title: Soil Moisture by Zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), soil_moisture_south_1 AS "South 1" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_moisture_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_moisture_south_2 AS "South 2" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_moisture_south_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_moisture_west AS "West" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_moisture_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows current soil moisture conditions across the monitored greenhouse zones.

panels.title: Soil Temperature by Zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), soil_temp_south_1 AS "South 1" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_temp_south_2 AS "South 2" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_south_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), soil_temp_west AS "West" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Soil EC — South 1 (SEN0601)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), soil_ec_south_1 AS "EC (µS/cm)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_ec_south_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows soil EC from the south-zone probe that includes conductivity sensing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, temp_south AS "South Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, temp_east AS "East Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, temp_west AS "West Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: REVIEW — Zone Temperature Comparison — South vs East vs West
panels.description: Direct temperature comparison for the three most important growing zones.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, vpd_south AS "South VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, vpd_east AS "East VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, vpd_west AS "West VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: REVIEW — Zone VPD Comparison — South vs East vs West
panels.description: Direct VPD comparison for the three main growing zones.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT zone AS time, avg_delta_kpa AS "Average VPD Drop"
FROM (
  SELECT 'South'::text AS zone, COALESCE(avg(vpd_delta),0) AS avg_delta_kpa FROM v_mister_effectiveness WHERE zone='south'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'West'::text AS zone, COALESCE(avg(vpd_delta),0) AS avg_delta_kpa FROM v_mister_effectiveness WHERE zone='west'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Center'::text AS zone, COALESCE(avg(vpd_delta),0) AS avg_delta_kpa FROM v_mister_effectiveness WHERE zone='center'
) s

panels.title: REVIEW — Mister Effectiveness by Zone — Average VPD Drop per Pulse
panels.description: Average drop in VPD per mister pulse by zone. Useful for showing why the center zone underperforms.
